a.label: E = F_0(u)(w_1,...,w_k)
a.standard_term: multiquadratic extension field generated by the k radicals w_i = sqrt(u+N_i^2)

b.label: sigma = w_1+...+w_k
b.standard_term: all-positive signed radical sum, i.e. s_eps(U) at eps=(1,...,1)

evidence.label: Collision classification and certified strata
evidence.summary: the sheet-collision components of the discriminant are the signed sub-balance varieties sum_{i in D} sigma_i w_i = 0 ... Among the real sheets of the physical chamber these reduce to focal coincidences N_i^2 = N_j^2; cer

evidence.label: Theorem 2(v) — birational geometric form; C is the affine no
evidence.summary:
(v)   Geometric form [v2, strengthened]: let
       C = Spec F0[m, w_1..w_k]/(w_i^2 - d_i) and let
       X = V(Phi_k) ⊂ A^2_(m,M) be the axial curve. Then
       phi : C -> X, (m, w) |-> (m, s/4), is birational; moreove

evidence.label: Curvature order (blow-up order, weighted order)
evidence.summary:
For a scalar germ \(f\) along \(D_a\), write
\[
\operatorname{ord}_{D_a}(f)=\lambda
\]
when \(f=z_a^\lambda u\) with \(u|_{D_a}\neq0\). Define the signed blow-up order
\[
\kappa_{D_a}(f):=-\operatorname{ord}_{D_a}(f).
\]
